description_long: This butcher shop features a compact, rectangular structure with a flat roof and a combination of metal and concrete exterior surfaces. The front facade is distinguished by a striped orange-and-white awning above a large service window, with a wooden door and a small blue storage unit nearby. Three cylindrical roof vents and a prominent metal ladder provide rooftop access, while a rounded corner and small balcony add architectural interest. A hanging lantern-style light fixture extends from the front, enhancing visibility and drawing attention to the entrance. The side and rear walls are mostly plain, with minimal decoration and a utilitarian design. The shop's color palette is dominated by white, gray, and blue tones, with wood accents and metallic details.
description: A compact, modern butcher shop with a striped awning, large service window, rooftop vents, and a metal ladder. The exterior features white, gray, and blue tones with wood and metal accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded corner, metal ladder, and balcony railing, with roof vents visible on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the striped awning, large service window, wooden door, and hanging lantern light fixture.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying the awning, blue storage unit, and the side-mounted lantern, with the service window partially open.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain wall, metal ladder, balcony, and a secondary door, with roof vents and minimal decoration.
attribute_large_front_windows: Yes, there is a large front service window beneath the striped awning, rectangular in shape and spanning most of the shop's front facade.
